_comment_1: Starter pcf-helper config. Copy this file to either location (remove the _comment_* keys first):
_comment_2: - Global (applies to every PCF project on this machine): ~/.pcf-helper/config.json  (Windows: %USERPROFILE%\.pcf-helper\config.json)
_comment_4: Precedence: CLI flags > active profile > top-level session > legacy session.config.json > defaults.
_comment_5: Run `pcf-helper-run profile list` to see what is currently resolved.

session._comment: Shared session defaults. A profile's own `session` block wins over these when that profile is active.
